items.name: Blodam

items.name: Contorso

items.passives: Vitality Level 4: Base Attack applies 2 Burn stack per Rank Level 20: Increase Burn damage by 50% per Rank, up to 300% on Rank S

items.name: Boucharo
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Sorrowful Chapelier
items.passives: Agility Level 4: Start battle in Agile Mask Level 10: Agile Mask applies Rush for 3 turns Level 20: +50% Critical Chance while in Agile Mask

items.name: Brumaro
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Aberration west of Spring Meadows, requieres Esquie's ability to fly
items.passives: Agility Level 4: Replay instantly when in Almighty Mask Level 10: +3 AP when in Almighty Mask Level 20: Revive instantly with full Health if dead while in Almighty Mask. Once per Battle

items.name: Chromaro
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from the Gestral Merchant, Grour, for 102585 Chroma
items.passives: Defense Level 4: Start battle in Caster Mask Level 10: Caster Mask applies Regen for 3 turns Level 20: Skills cost 1 less AP while in Caster Mask

items.name: Fragaro
items.how_to_find: Sold by Mistra for 35360 Chroma
items.passives: Defense Level 4: Free Aim shots spin the Bestial Wheel to a random value Level 10: Free Aim shots deal 100% more damage with all Masks except Almighty Level 20: 100% Critical Chance while in Almighty Mask

items.name: Grandaro
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Grandis Merchant for 53901 Chroma
items.passives: Defense Level 4: Start battle in Heavy Mask Level 10: Heavy Mask applies Shell for 3 turns Level 20: +1 AP per hit taken

items.name: Joyaro
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Lampmaster Defeat the Ultimate Sakapatate
items.passives: Defense Level 4: Start battle in Almighty Mask Level 20: Break damage is doubled while in Almighty Mask

items.name: Monocaro
items.how_to_find: Starting weapon for Monoco
items.passives: Luck Level 4: Start battle in Balanced Mask Level 10: Balanced Mask applies Powerful for 3 turns Level 20: Critical hits deal 30% more damage while in Balanced Mask

items.name: Nusaro
items.how_to_find: From the Right Street, head down the path to the field and go through the broken doorway on the right. Take out the enemies ahead, and continue up the path to pick up Nusaro
items.passives: Vitality Level 4: Parries increase the Bestial Wheel by 1. Taking damage resets the Bestial Wheel Level 20: +1 AP on Mask change

items.name: Sidaro
items.how_to_find: Defeat Golgra with Monoco Sold by Fusoka for 76610 Chroma
items.passives: Might Level 4: 30% increased damage per Upgraded Skill used. Resets upon using a non-Upgraded Skil Level 20: Using an Upgraded Skill gives 1 AP to all other allies

items.name: Urnaro
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Glaise
items.passives: Luck Level 4: Switch to Almighty Mask on Breaking an enemy Level 10: Almighty Mask gives 2 AP to all allies Level 20: 50% increased Break damage
